title: Discogs
name: Discogs
body:
Music database and marketplace. Discogs has a confirmed Killd By artist page at **https://www.discogs.com/artist/6264374-killd-by**.

**Action item (next active pass):** Pull the full Discogs page including `Appearances` and `Credits` tabs. Download each release's metadata (catalog number, year, tracklist) into a `CRFW_Discogs.xlsx` workbook. Also search for: `alphabets denver`, `pocketdove`, `tudaloos`, `colin ward denver`.
